overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rainy forest at night, holding a torch. The character travels from a dense wooded area into a rustic settlement with wooden carts, fences, and NPCs.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow forest path holding a torch to illuminate the way through the rain

entered.detail: tall dense trees lining both sides of the path creating an enclosed corridor
thick tree canopy overhead blocking most of the night sky
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense, rainy forest at night, the torch illuminating the narrow dirt path and surrounding trees. The canopy blocks most of the sky, creating an enclosed, atmospheric environment with no other characters visible.

events.description: forest opens up from dense enclosed trees to wider path with visible night sky
wooden cart and fence posts come into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the widening forest path as the terrain opens up and settlement structures appear

entered.detail: large wooden wagon with canvas cover parked beside the path
rough wooden fence posts marking the settlement boundary
dark blue night sky visible through the thinning tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The path widens as the forest opens up, revealing the night sky above. A wooden cart and fence posts appear on the left, signaling the approach to a settlement. The rain continues to fall as the character moves from the dense woods into a more open area.

events.description: entering the settlement area with wooden huts, fences, and carts
group of NPC villagers become visible near the wooden structures on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement area approaching a group of villagers gathered near wooden structures

notable_agents.action: group of villagers standing and conversing near a thatched roof hut

entered.detail: wooden structure with thatched roof and open sides
stacked wooden barrels near the fence line
warm orange light from a fire or torch near the villagers

segments.scene_description: The character enters a rustic settlement with wooden carts, fences, and thatched huts. The path is lined with wooden planks and barrels. Near the end of the clip, a group of NPC villagers becomes visible on the right, standing near a warm light source as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy nocturnal forest that gradually opens into a rustic village settlement. It begins on a narrow dirt path where a torch illuminates the surrounding trees under a dense, enclosing canopy. As the path widens, the forest canopy thins to reveal the night sky, and the first signs of civilization appear in the form of a wooden cart and fence posts. The scene then expands into a settlement filled with thatched huts, barrels, and wooden planks before finally turning toward a group of villagers gathered near a warm light source in the persistent rain.
